content:
Dear customer,

Thank you for your business. Please find below the details of our recent transaction.

We billed your account for the amount of FIVE HUNDRED FIFTY-FIVE dollars and zero cents ($555.00) on April 9, 2026 for the items listed in your order #ORD-22.

This invoice (reference: INV-PG-2026-04-09-A) was issued by Penguin Goods.

Best regards,
Penguin Goods Accounts Team
